reviews.comment:
Cargo siempre hai.porque purgan los tanques todos los.meses.aparte no hay sopa para los que no entienden.mezcla de la más barata con la más cara en ninguna A.C.A.se juegan el puesto para los que no saben después de la descarga.de sorpresa aparecen los controles tomando muestras.de la descarga.. mí auto.de trece.años tiene una sola limpieza de inyectores...

(Translated by Google)
There's always fuel available because they purge the tanks every month. Besides, there's no "soup" for those who don't understand. Mixing the cheapest with the most expensive fuel is a common practice at any ACA (Automotive Control Agency). They risk their jobs for those who don't know better. After the fuel is unloaded, inspectors unexpectedly show up taking samples. My thirteen-year-old car has only had its injectors cleaned once...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLamN6ZXR3RRAB
